title: Nautalus
description: Nautalus is a total rework of Vanilla Minecraft, placing the player in a tropical setting.
body:
![The Nautalus Logo in front of an out of focus island background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea1ed01377460c294fdf9d7cc9ba628ee3c4fda2.png)
# Overview
Nautalus completely changes Minecraft in every conceivable way, from transforming the world into a tropical archipelago populated with entirely new mobs like the Giant Crab and Shellmite, to revamping the vanilla progression for something more unique. Cultivate grass farms to create the rope needed to bind your tools, and collect crab claws to shovel the sand you'll need for your sieve. Live as a shipwrecked castaway fighting for their life in an uncaring yet beautiful oasis, and conquer the deities that rule this land.

_Nautalus is inspired by the fantasy elements of games like Terraria, Don't Starve, and early versions of Minecraft._

# Features
**New Mobs** - _From sharks to starfish to the agitated local villagers, every creature is new_\
**Reworked Equipment Progression** - _Battle bosses and trade with crabs to progress the game_\
**Reworked Magic System** - _Collect Ocean Scrolls within messages in a bottle to learn magic and imbue your tools with the strength needed to defeat bosses_\
**Boss Fights** - _Work your way up the chain of command_\
**World Generation** - _The lands have flooded due to an unknown entity; boats are a necessity 
for traversing the archipelago_

_Nautalus is built for multiplayer - Bosses drop loot scaled to your team of players; it's easier with friends!_
